c22694.st: Paul, a prisoner of Christ Jesus, and Timothy [our] brother,

c22695.st: To Philemon our beloved fellow worker, to Apphia our sister,

c22696.st: to Archippus our fellow soldier, and to the church [that meets] at your house:

c22697.st: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and [the] Lord Jesus Christ.

c22699.st: making mention of you in my prayers,

c22700.st: because I hear about ... faith ... your love

c22701.st: your ... in the Lord Jesus and ... for all the saints.

c22702.st: [I pray] that your partnership in the faith may become effective

c22703.st: as you fully acknowledge every good [thing] that [is] ours in Christ.

c22704.st: I take great joy and encouragement in your love,

c22705.st: because you, brother, have refreshed the hearts of the saints.

c22706.st: So {although} in Christ I am bold enough

c22707.st: to order you [to do] what [is] proper,

c22708.st: I prefer to appeal on the basis of love.

c22710.st: now ... and a prisoner of Christ Jesus as well.

c22711.st: I appeal to you for my child

c22712.st: Onesimus, whose father I became [while I was] in chains.

c22714.st: but now [he has become] useful both to you and to me.

c22715.st: I am sending back to you

c22720.st: so that on your behalf he could minister to me in [my] chains for the gospel.

c22721.st: But I did [not] want to do [anything] without your consent,

c22722.st: so that your goodness will not be out of compulsion,

c22723.st: but by your own free will.

c22724.st: For perhaps this is why he was separated [from you] for a while,

c22725.st: so that you might have him back for good —

c22727.st: but better than a slave, [as] a beloved brother.

c22729.st: but even more so to you, both in person and in [the] Lord.

c22730.st: So if you consider me a partner,

c22731.st: receive him as [you would receive] me.

c22732.st: But if he has wronged you in any way or owes [you anything],

c22734.st: I, Paul, write [this] with my own hand.

c22737.st: that you owe me your very self.

c22738.st: Yes, brother, let me have some benefit from you in [the] Lord.

c22743.st: that you will do even more than I ask.

c22744.st: In the meantime, prepare a guest room for me,

c22746.st: that through your prayers, I will be restored to you.

c22747.st: Epaphras, my fellow prisoner in Christ Jesus, sends you greetings,

c22748.st: [as do] Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, [and] Luke, my fellow workers.

c22749.st: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ [be] with your spirit.
